name: Brightside Coffee — Growth Dashboard
based_on: A Geckoboard / Klipfolio-style single-screen growth dashboard for a direct-to-consumer ecommerce brand (a DTC specialty coffee subscription company), the kind a small team pins to the office TV and glances at all day.
summary: A single-screen, auto-refreshing growth dashboard for a DTC brand: live KPI tiles with sparklines, a revenue trend, traffic-source breakdown, top products, and a channel leaderboard.
sections: Top KPI tiles: revenue today, revenue MTD vs target, orders, average order value, conversion rate (each with a sparkline and up/down delta)
Revenue trend line chart for the last 30 days with a 7-day moving average
Traffic by source donut (organic / paid / email / social / direct)
Top 5 products table with units sold and revenue bars
Marketing channel leaderboard with ROAS and spend
Email list growth counter and new-subscriber sparkline
Auto-refresh clock and 'last updated' timestamp that ticks numbers with subtle animation
setup_questions: What's the brand name and what do you sell?
Which 4-6 metrics matter most to your team day to day?
What's your brand's primary accent color?
photo_terms: specialty coffee bag product flat lay
